title: Oshakati Independence Stadium

infobox.value: This article about a [Namibian](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") sports venue is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Oshakati_Independence_Stadium&action=edit).

is a football stadium in [Oshakati](/wiki/Oshakati "Oshakati"), [Oshana Region](/wiki/Oshana_Region "Oshana Region"), [Namibia](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia"). Home to [Oshakati City F.C.](/wiki/Oshakati_City_F.C. "Oshakati City F.C.") formerly of the [Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League"), Oshakati Independence Stadium can seat 8,000 spectators. It was built over seven years at a cost of 20 million [Namibian dollars](/wiki/Namibian_dollar "Namibian dollar"), but needed [N$](/wiki/Namibian_dollar "Namibian dollar")55,000 worth of repairs just a year later.[[1]](#cite_note-1) In February 2008, two people died at the stadium during intense flooding across northern Namibia.[[2]](#cite_note-2)
[Oshakati Stadium heading for repairs](http://www.namibian.com.na/2004/march/sport/042CAA276C.html) *[The Namibian](/wiki/The_Namibian "The Namibian")*, 10 March 2004
[Two die at flood centres Second wave hits Oshakati](http://www.namibian.com.na/2008/February/national/08E9723892.html) [The Namibian](/wiki/The_Namibian "The Namibian"), 21 February 2008

[Coordinates](/wiki/Geographic_coordinate_system "Geographic coordinate system"): [17°47′15″S 15°41′32″E﻿ / ﻿17.78750°S 15.69222°E﻿ / -17.78750; 15.69222](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Oshakati_Independence_Stadium&params=17_47_15_S_15_41_32_E_type:landmark_region:NA-ON)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Football stadium in Oshakati, Oshana, Namibia

**Oshakati Independence Stadium** is a football stadium in [Oshakati](/wiki/Oshakati "Oshakati"), [Oshana Region](/wiki/Oshana_Region "Oshana Region"), [Namibia](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia"). Home to [Oshakati City F.C.](/wiki/Oshakati_City_F.C. "Oshakati City F.C.") formerly of the [Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League"), Oshakati Independence Stadium can seat 8,000 spectators. It was built over seven years at a cost of 20 million [Namibian dollars](/wiki/Namibian_dollar "Namibian dollar"), but needed [N$](/wiki/Namibian_dollar "Namibian dollar")55,000 worth of repairs just a year later.[[1]](#cite_note-1) In February 2008, two people died at the stadium during intense flooding across northern Namibia.[[2]](#cite_note-2)
